{{Quote|This is Treks One-Fifteen-W. It's an old main-sequence star on the outermost fringe of the Deep Core, completely unexceptionable.|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way">''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''</ref>}}
'''Treskov 115-W''' was a main sequence [[Star/Legends|star]] that was located on the edge of the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] within the [[Treskov system]] which included [[Ebaq 9]]. For a long time an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] supply depot, in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]] it served as the location for a major [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] ambush of a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] fleet.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1st}}
*[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way (abridged audiobook)|''The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way'' abridged audiobook]]
